decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

components.label: Net sales milestone ($3.7B threshold)

low.label: Net sales milestone payment if achieved in 2028 measurement period

source.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(i): $17.50 per CVR if Net Sales Milestone achieved during 2028 Measurement Period

low.label: Net sales milestone payment if achieved in 2028-29 measurement period only

source.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(ii): $8.75 per CVR if achieved during 2028-29 Measurement Period after missing 2028 period

low.label: Worldwide net sales threshold for net sales milestone

source.locator: Net Sales Milestone: aggregate worldwide Net Sales exceeds $3,700,000,000

low.label: Abiomed FY2022 worldwide revenue (pre-acquisition baseline)

source.locator: Full year revenue totaled $1.032 billion for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022

low.label: Probability of exceeding $3.7B net sales in the 2028 measurement period
low.rationale: FY2022 revenue $1.0B; milestone requires ~3.6× run-rate by JNJ FY2028 Q1 window. JNJ MedTech distribution and Impella penetration partially offset but threshold remains ambitious.

low.label: Probability of reduced $8.75 payment in 2028-29 measurement period
low.rationale: Captures delayed four-quarter achievement at half rate if primary window missed.

low.label: Expected value from full-period milestone

components.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 8.3125/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 8.3125, 'high': 17.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: 2028 Measurement Period through 2028-29 Measurement Period per CVR Agreement.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base P=40% full period; P=15% delayed; FY2022 revenue $1.032B vs $3.7B threshold.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No holder capital call; zero remaining capital on CVR claim.

components.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

high.rationale: FY2022 revenue $1.0B; milestone requires ~3.6× run-rate by JNJ FY2028 Q1 window. JNJ MedTech distribution and Impella penetration partially offset but threshold remains ambitious.

high.label: Probability of reduced $8.75 payment in 2028-29 measurement period

source_lineage.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(i): $17.50 per CVR if Net Sales Milestone achieved during 2028 Measurement Period

Net Sales Milestone: aggregate worldwide Net Sales exceeds $3,700,000,000

options.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 8.3125/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
options.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 8.3125, 'high': 17.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: 2028 Measurement Period through 2028-29 Measurement Period per CVR Agreement.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base P=40% full period; P=15% delayed; FY2022 revenue $1.032B vs $3.7B threshold.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No holder capital call; zero remaining capital on CVR claim.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.
